title: Just Some More Bees
description: This pack adds more types of bees to encounter!
body:
![Just Some More Bees Logo](https://i.imgur.com/zXg4f2o.png)
**WARNING! YOU MUST USE OPTIFINE FOR THIS TO WORK!**

This pack adds more amazing types of bees to discover! This packs' randomized bee textures bring more life into your world!


```

```


### HOW TO USE

Download the pack.

Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder. *(Unzipping is optional.)*

Open your Minecraft Launcher and launch your version of [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home).

It's now ready to be used!

 

 

*<sub>This pack was originally posted on my [PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/just-some-more-bees-pack/), go check it out!</sub>*
